title: bohereth #0934
definition:
1) white patch of skin, brightness, bright spot (on skin)
 2) (CLBL) bright spot, scar, blister, boil
    2a) resulting from fire
    2b) resulting from inflammation of the skin
    2c) possible sign of leprosy
nasbUsage:
